- text: Highlights
- link "Book your next stay with us For a limited period, enjoy 10% off hotel bookings from around the world. T&Cs applies.":
  - /url: https://www.singaporeair.com/hotel
- link "Stretch your miles further this March Redeem now to enjoy exclusive redemption offers and bonus miles conversion.":
  - /url: https://www.singaporeair.com/en_UK/sg/ppsclub-krisflyer/endlessrewards/?utm_source=saa_highlights&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=kf_endless_rewards
- link "Fly with exclusive perks as a student Travel smart with up to 3 pieces of checked baggage, exclusive discounts, and more.":
  - /url: https://www.singaporeair.com/en_UK/us/plan-travel/promotions/student-privileges/?itm_source=StuHomepageHighlights
- link "KrisShop Spectacular Deals – Get the best value for your miles Enjoy 20% off any purchase on KrisShop when you redeem with KrisFlyer miles. T&Cs apply.":
  - /url: https://www.krisshop.com/en/store/spectacular-deals?utm_source=saa.bau&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=ww_20260310_sq_link_saa.bau_home.highlight_kssd
- text: Seamless travel made easy
